design_decisions: Implemented secure hex nonces for all script tags to remove 'unsafe-inline'.
Updated templates to use {{NONCE}} placeholder for literal script tags.
Removed 'unsafe-eval' from offline CSP as it was unnecessary for pre-compiled assets.
Restricted connect-src to 'none' in offline mode.
Used token_hex instead of token_urlsafe to ensure compatibility with all CSP parsers.
results: Successfully tightened CSP. Verified with 157 tests including E2E frontend tests. PR #18 opened.
